message:
chore(engine): apply rustfmt, add NodeCompat .mjs exclusion test, and sync beads

Formatting:
- Reformat long argument lists and assertion blocks in
  deterministic_replay.rs, baseline_interpreter.rs, and stdlib.rs

Test addition:
- New module_resolver test asserting that require() in NodeCompat mode
  excludes .mjs suffixes from candidate paths

Beads:
- Refresh timestamps on tracked issue entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
